summary: Verified all P0 bug fixes and P1 feature for TrustOffice. Both P0 bugs (Save Minutes, Distribution Clock Icon) are fixed and working correctly. P1 auto-populate feature is functional.

issues: React warning about <tr> cannot be child of <span> - HTML structure issue in table rendering. Non-blocking.

backend_api: POST /api/minutes-templates - Creates draft minutes with generated_document
PUT /api/minutes-templates/{id} - Updates minutes with status='final' - P0 BUG FIXED
PATCH /api/distributions/{id}/approve - Approves distribution with solvency/recusal checks
PATCH /api/distributions/{id}/status - Sets approved distribution back to review - P0 BUG FIXED
GET /api/entities - Returns entity data for auto-population
Minutes template accepts auto-populated data (trust_indenture_date, trustees_present)
frontend_ui: Minutes Templates page (/minutes/templates) displays all template cards
General Meeting template form loads at /minutes/template/general_meeting
Trust Indenture Date field auto-populated with 'January 15, 2020' - P1 FEATURE WORKING
Trustees Present auto-populated with 'John Smith', 'Jane Smith' - P1 FEATURE WORKING
Generate Preview button generates minutes document
Document Preview mode shows editable textarea with generated content
Save Minutes button saves and navigates to /minutes page
'Minutes saved' toast notification appears - P0 BUG CONFIRMED FIXED
Distribution clock icon (set to review) works - PATCH endpoint called
'Distribution set to review' toast notification appears - P0 BUG CONFIRMED FIXED
Distribution status changes from APPROVED to REVIEW after clock icon click

critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug 1 FIXED: PUT /api/minutes-templates/{id} now properly updates status to 'final' and persists the generated_document
P0 Bug 2 FIXED: PATCH /api/distributions/{id}/status endpoint correctly resets approval fields (approved_by, approved_at, solvency_confirmed, recusal_acknowledged) when setting status to 'review'
P1 Feature WORKING: MinutesTemplateFormPage.js loadTrustEntityData() correctly fetches entity data and auto-populates trust_indenture_date from formation_date and trustees_present from trustee_names
Minor: DistributionsPage.js has invalid HTML structure causing React hydration warning (span inside tbody). This is cosmetic and non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data with Smith Family Trust which has Entity with formation_date='January 15, 2020' and trustee_names='John Smith, Jane Smith'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs are confirmed fixed. The Save Minutes flow works end-to-end: create template -> generate preview -> save minutes -> navigate to /minutes page. The Distribution clock icon correctly calls PATCH /distributions/{id}/status with {status: 'review'} and clears approval fields. Auto-populate feature pulls from Entity data (formation_date -> trust_indenture_date, trustee_names -> trustees_present split by comma).

P0_save_minutes.fix: PUT /api/minutes-templates/{id} endpoint now uses MinutesTemplateUpdate Pydantic model with optional fields for generated_document, status, template_data
P0_save_minutes.verification: Successfully created minute template, generated preview, saved with status='final', verified persistence via GET

P0_distribution_clock_icon.issue: Clicking clock icon on approved distributions caused error
P0_distribution_clock_icon.fix: New PATCH /api/distributions/{id}/status endpoint with DistributionStatusUpdate Pydantic model. Frontend handleUpdateStatus now calls PATCH with JSON body {status: 'review'}
P0_distribution_clock_icon.verification: Successfully approved distribution, clicked clock icon, status changed to review, approval fields cleared

P1_auto_populate_minutes_form.implementation: loadTrustEntityData() in MinutesTemplateFormPage.js fetches entities via GET /api/entities?trust_id={id}, finds Trust entity, extracts formation_date and trustee_names
